response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, technical leadership, and people management, with a strong focus on developer tools and automation. His background includes 14+ years in technical roles, 10+ years in leadership, and hands-on contributions to build systems, testing infrastructure, and dev-ops tooling. While his mobile platform experience is limited, his expertise in developer productivity tools and cross-functional collaboration aligns well with the role's core responsibilities.
strengths: Deep experience in developer tools, build systems, and testing infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, CI/CD pipelines, Selenium courses)
Proven technical leadership in mid-to-senior management roles with full-stack development across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record of organizing and mentoring teams, including workshops, code katas, and technical training
concerns: Limited direct experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) or their specific tooling
No explicit mention of organizational change leadership or strategic roadmap planning in the resume
Primary focus on general software engineering rather than specialized developer productivity tooling for large-scale mobile platforms
